chapters.title: The best way to make your dream career come true is to use LinkedIn for personal branding
chapters.text:
Anyone seeking career opportunities should have a LinkedIn profile because many Google searches of people’s names go straight there. It allows job seekers to be easily found by clients, colleagues, and hiring managers. Some of the things individuals can do to get noticed on LinkedIn:

• Have a complete profile.
• Ensure your profile is public and visible.
• Display your full name.
• Declare your location, preferably the city you work in and your industry.
• Have a customized URL that has your exact first and last name.
• Be free to share your contact information.

Applicants must be careful with the words they use on LinkedIn because they determine the kind of impression they create. Another tip is to choose the correct industry language when filling their profiles. Try to write in the first person consistently to make it more compelling and interesting. Aside from using good industry language, users should add visuals like images, links, and media. Also, their headshots — profile pictures — should appear professional. For example, consider putting a picture of you smiling and dressed in attire that fits your industry.

Always ensure your LinkedIn profile represents who you are and what you do.

Users should take advantage of another exciting LinkedIn feature: their background image. The picture you upload on your background image should reflect your personal and professional brand. Avoid using any random pictures as your background image. Instead, consider using pictures you took, personally designed, purchased, or free images from online sites. You can enhance your LinkedIn experience and education sections by adding rich media, such as slide presentations, photos, and videos. Also, there is a featured section on the platform where you can showcase your work samples, brochures, videos, and documents, allowing you to provide evidence of the skill they claim to have. In addition, you can add your social media links to the contact information section.

chapters.title: Use images and featured sections to create a good visual brand
chapters.text:

chapters.title: Maximize the sections on your LinkedIn profile to display personal and professional accomplishments
chapters.text:
Write your professional experience section in first person to make it more captivating. Boost your brand in this section by using industry-relevant terms, keywords, action-oriented verbs, links, and visuals. Make sure to list your title, company, location, dates, and a detailed description for each position in the experience section. Try to focus on your achievements rather than responsibilities. For instance, talk more about what you achieved in the role, not necessarily the duties you performed. Also, do well to provide accurate information on your profile and consider confidentiality when writing about your experience.

LinkedIn helps job seekers to find a job faster and easier because most hiring managers already use it.

The education section is another aspect you must complete while creating a LinkedIn profile. Provide accurate information regarding the college and high school you attended and your exact major and degrees to enhance networking. Other sections to take note of include:

• Activity section. This is where your interactions, including likes, comments, and shares, are highlighted. Additionally, the posts, articles, and documents tabs showcase content tailored to you in this section.
• Organization section. This is your list of the names, positions, dates, and brief descriptions of the professional associations and organizations you are involved with.
• Language section. Add the languages you speak and your level of proficiency in this section. This section is crucial for multilingual people, as prospective employers generally love to communicate with individuals who can speak their native language.
• Licenses and certifications. Here is where you list the titles of your credentials, the certifying authority(s), license number(s), the certification URL(s), and the applicable dates.

You should complete all the sections mentioned accurately and honestly. Furthermore, make the information in each section so interesting that no one can resist going through it.

When deciding about your word choice, think about your entire audience and, most especially, your targeted prospect. ~ Sandra Long

chapters.title: Take advantage of the headline and About section on your profile to talk about your career
chapters.text:
The headline section is the first thing prospective clients and hiring managers will see when they visit a person’s profile. So, individuals seeking career opportunities should consider writing a compelling, authentic, and creative headline. It’s helpful when job seekers avoid using words like “unemployed” or “searching” in their headlines. Instead, they should consider using strategic keywords and a value statement. You can use the following tips while writing this section:

• Be specific and use words that differentiate you from others.
• Be truthful.
• Get inspiration from others in your industry.
• Your headline should be something you are comfortable with.

LinkedIn users should ensure their headlines focus on personal brand and professional priorities.

Always make sure your LinkedIn essays are interesting and show your unique qualities.

Another important section is the LinkedIn About section; it is the story that draws the attention of the right clients or jobs. Ensure you write this section in an interesting way. For example, you can start your opening sentence and paragraph with an engaging hook about how you approached a confusing issue in your former workplace. This introduction would compel your audience to be eager to work with you or refer you to someone else. Don’t just rush to write this story; take time to know the goal you want to achieve and write an excellent essay that distinguishes you from others. For instance, how a job seeker writes the about section will differ from how recruiters write theirs. You must know what you want to achieve with your essay so that what you come up with will align with your goals. Consider your audience and write in such a way that will pique their interest in your about section. Additionally, you can include your personal interest in the essay.

chapters.title: Endorsements and recommendations authenticate your skills, capabilities, and work
chapters.text:
When a LinkedIn user takes the time to select the right skills relevant to their brands, it makes it easier for prospects to find them. Job seekers must be honest about their abilities because recruiters are searching for people with specific skill sets.

Users can also choose to take LinkedIn's skill assessment for verification. After strategically choosing skills that apply to you, like content writing, project management, and public speaking, the next thing to do is get endorsements from others and also endorse people. This allows others to confirm the skills you have selected on your profile. Make a habit of endorsing colleagues, clients, vendors, or people who have helped you or taught you something as a way of supporting them. Doing this allows others to trust them and be willing to employ or try out their services.

Leaders should be comfortable giving recommendations to their employees, partners, and vendors because it serves as proof that they are supportive.

It’s also okay to ask for endorsements from others. Individuals can do this by conversing with others about the skills they have prioritized on their LinkedIn profiles. Let people know about your skills and those you’re developing to open a conversation that will enhance personal development and learning. Job seekers or employees can move further to get recommendations from at least three people to provide valuable social proof to their networks. A LinkedIn recommendation serves as a public endorsement of a person’s capabilities or contributions. You can ask clients, partners, referral sources, employers, and community connections for recommendations, and it is best to do so after completing a project. Always remember to send a thank-you note or LinkedIn message to those who recommend you.

Before giving recommendations, discuss them with the person, then go to their LinkedIn profile to validate their skills. Ensure you write something genuine and describe a particular situation where you either worked with them or they helped you. The recommendation should be specific and timely.

chapters.title: Things to do to make your LinkedIn profile attractive and meaningful
chapters.text:
After completing every LinkedIn section, you should do a final check to ensure all information provided is accurate and consistent. There are several ways to do this:

• Check for unnecessary information on your profile that does not relate to your brand. Accuracy will make it easy for others to understand and know you better.
• Remove confidential information like criminal charges, so you don’t get into trouble.
• Ensure your profile dates are similar to what’s on your resume.
• Check your spelling and grammar.
• Use your phone or tablet to view your profile and try to adjust anything that doesn’t appear professional.
• Always consider the overall readability and appearance of your profile.
• Ensure all information is correct and consider using symbols and bullet points to make it look more beautiful.
• Always take the time to think before posting anything on your profile so that you don’t sound controversial.
• Use a laptop or desktop instead of a smartphone or tablet to edit any information on your profile.

After making the necessary changes, you should consider promoting your LinkedIn profiles by adding the link to your email signature and attaching the LinkedIn profile to social sites like YouTube, Instagram, Twitter, and Facebook. Always ensure your profile is up to date; your personal brand is constantly changing, so make sure your profile is current.

The best way to gain followers on LinkedIn is by commenting and creating content.

A good way to make your LinkedIn profile interesting is to create content. Always be yourself when you write and share valuable insights. For beginners, it’s advisable to start reading and commenting on other people’s posts. You must ensure your posts have a clean and exciting look so people can easily read them and add up to three hashtags to enhance your page’s visibility. Finally, engage others on your content; this will help build valuable relationships.

Did you know? According to Forbes, 95% of recruiters are looking for job candidates on LinkedIn.

chapters.title: Conclusion
chapters.text:
LinkedIn is quite beneficial in many ways. It helps build meaningful relationships with others and gives people the opportunity to support and encourage their colleagues, clients, and vendors. LinkedIn can also help job seekers connect with prospective hiring managers and employers. In contrast, several disadvantages come with using this platform:

• The risk of identity theft is prevalent because the LinkedIn platform requires individuals to display lots of personal information for prospective employers to see. Identity thieves can steal people’s information by sending phishing emails that impersonate legit companies to trick people into giving out sensitive information like passwords or credit card numbers.
• Using the platform can be time-consuming. A lot of time is needed for people to learn to use LinkedIn effectively and get the most out of the platform. You will need a lot of time, like months or even years, to be able to build a presence on LinkedIn. You have to set aside some minutes every day to get the most out of the platform.
• The LinkedIn premium package can be pricey; although everyone can join the platform for free, you will need to pay to access the premium package. For instance, the medium-sized career tier costs about $29.99 per month, which can be costly for starters or medium-sized businesses.
• Even professionals might not get recognition on the platform; you must be active on LinkedIn to be known. So, even if you are an expert and have all it takes to get recruited, but your profile is dated and you don’t connect with others, you might not get seen.

Although using LinkedIn has its disadvantages, it’s still a great platform to search for and post available jobs, professional experience, internship opportunities, and even to join a professional community. However, individuals should use the platform with caution and responsibly. Comment on posts, contribute content and ensure your profile is up to date to gain more visibility and get the best out of LinkedIn.

Try this

Revamp your LinkedIn profile and include all the new experiences you have. To get more followers, try to post helpful content daily. Also, comment on other people’s posts to gain traction and build relationships.

Read it till the end?
